title: malus orthocarpa
intro: Malus orthocarpa, also known as the Korean crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Malus orthocarpa include antioxidant and anti-diabetic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Malus orthocarpa often include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to harness its health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health.
